outlook.summary: Spot at 6833.5 trades 300+ points above visible strike range (6495-6640), indicating strong bullish momentum with no overhead resistance visible. All strikes represent deep ITM calls with volume-based positioning. The 6620 strike shows RESONANCE across all three expirations as primary support zone. Max Pain at 6155 coincides with Gamma Flip - far below spot, confirming bullish structure. Watch for pullback to 6640-6620 zone for re-entry opportunities.

Highest MONTHLY volume concentration (682 vol). Major structural support defining deeper pullback zone. Volume/OI ratio indicates fresh positioning.
Structural gamma equilibrium coinciding with Max Pain. Far below spot (-10%) but defines long-term structural pivot. Monthly GEX slightly positive (0.01B) suggests stability at this zone.
